stemHtml: Consider an aeroplane equipped with both leading edge slats and trailing edge flaps. What is the effect of the extension of leading-edge slats?

options.a: A greater reduction of the stalling speed, compared to the reduction achieved by the extension of the trailing-edge flaps.
options.b: A reduction of the stalling speed, while extension of the trailing-edge flaps will increase the stalling speed.
options.c: An increase of the stalling speed, while extension of the trailing-edge flaps will reduce the stalling speed.
options.d: A lesser reduction of the stalling speed, compared to the reduction achieved by the extension of the trailing-edge flaps.
